summary: Full e2e testing of Sheet KPI Buddy. Backend 100% passing (12/12 tests). Critical frontend bug found and fixed: TransactionsPage crashed due to SelectItem with empty string value. After fix, both pages function correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid prop not forwarded to root div - KPI cards not selectable by data-testid in tests

action_items: Add data-testid forwarding to KPICard component: add `...props` spread to root div or accept data-testid explicitly
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: TransactionsPage.js line 115 had SelectItem with value='' which is invalid in shadcn Select - caused full page crash. Fixed to value='all' with filter logic updated.
KPICard.js doesn't spread additional props (like data-testid) to root div - reduces testability
seed_data_creation: Demo data already seeded: 12 months KPI, 20 transactions, 8 categories
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully tested and passing. Frontend works - Dashboard with 6 KPI cards, 4 tabs (REVENUS/ACQUISITION/MEMBRES/MÉTRIQUES), Recharts charts, month selector, FR/EN language switch all functional. Transactions page shows 20 demo transactions, add modal opens, delete creates exclusions. Only issue: KPICard missing data-testid prop forwarding.
rca_of_issue: TransactionsPage.js used shadcn SelectItem with value='' (empty string) for 'Tous types' option. Radix UI Select/shadcn throws a runtime error when SelectItem value is empty string, crashing the entire Transactions page. Fix: changed value='' to value='all' and updated filter logic to check filterType !== 'all'.
